changeSet.author: codex
changeSet.sql:
UPDATE agent_profile_version SET agent_type = 'MAIN' WHERE id IN ( SELECT id FROM agent_profile_version WHERE published = TRUE AND COALESCE(NULLIF(agent_type, ''), 'ENTRY') = 'ENTRY' ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 );
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS uk_agent_profile_version_main ON agent_profile_version(agent_type) WHERE agent_type = 'MAIN';
